memberdef.argsstring: (const Environment &anEnvironment, const Duration &aStep=DEFAULT_STEP, const Duration &aTolerance=DEFAULT_TOLERANCE, const std::function< bool(const Access &)> &anAccessFilter={}, const std::function< bool(const State &, const State &)> &aStateFilter={})
memberdef.name: Generator

param.type: const std::function< bool(const State &, const State &)> &

parameterdescription.para: The space environment used for frame transformations and celestial body access.
The time step used when sampling the interval to detect visibility crossings. Defaults to 1 minute.
The temporal tolerance used when refining the precise time of an access crossing. Defaults to 1 microsecond.
An optional predicate applied to each candidate Access object; only accesses for which the predicate returns true are retained.
An optional predicate applied to the pair of from/to States at each sample; samples for which the predicate returns false are treated as non-visible.

briefdescription.para: Check whether this Generator is defined.

simplesect.para: True if the Generator is defined, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get the time step used when sampling the interval.
Get the temporal tolerance used for crossing refinement.

simplesect.para: The access filter function, or an empty function if none was set.
The state filter function, or an empty function if none was set.

briefdescription.para: Get a boolean condition function that evaluates visibility at a given instant.

detaileddescription.para: Returns a callable that, when invoked with an Instant, evaluates whether the given access target is visible from the "to" trajectory at that moment. This is primarily used internally to drive the crossing-detection logic, but is exposed for advanced use cases such as custom solvers.

parameterdescription.para: The access target to evaluate visibility against.
The trajectory of the observer (e.g. satellite).

simplesect.para: A function that returns true when the target is visible at a given instant.

memberdef.argsstring: (const physics::time::Interval &anInterval, const AccessTarget &anAccessTarget, const Trajectory &aToTrajectory, const bool &coarse=false) const
memberdef.name: computeAccesses

briefdescription.para: Compute accesses between a single access target and a trajectory over a time interval.

detaileddescription.para: Steps through the given interval at the configured step size, detects transitions in the visibility condition, and refines each transition to within the configured tolerance. The optional access filter and state filter are applied during this process.

parameterdescription.para: The time interval over which to compute accesses.
The access target to evaluate visibility against.
The trajectory of the observer (e.g. satellite).
If true, skips precise crossing refinement and returns coarse intervals only. Defaults to false.

simplesect.para: An array of Access objects representing each visibility window.

memberdef.argsstring: (const physics::time::Interval &anInterval, const Array< AccessTarget > &someAccessTargets, const Trajectory &aToTrajectory, const bool &coarse=false) const
memberdef.name: computeAccesses

briefdescription.para: Compute accesses between multiple access targets and a trajectory over a time interval.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling the single-target overload for each element of someAccessTargets, but may use a more efficient batched implementation for fixed targets. Returns one array of Access objects per target, in the same order as someAccessTargets.

parameterdescription.para: The time interval over which to compute accesses.
The array of access targets to evaluate visibility against.
The trajectory of the observer (e.g. satellite).
If true, skips precise crossing refinement and returns coarse intervals only. Defaults to false.

simplesect.para: An array of access arrays, one per access target, in the same order as someAccessTargets.

briefdescription.para: Set the time step used when sampling the interval.
Set the temporal tolerance used for crossing refinement.

detaileddescription.para: The filter is applied to each candidate Access object after all crossings have been refined. Only accesses for which the predicate returns true are included in the result.

param.type: const std::function< bool(const State &, const State &)> &

detaileddescription.para: The filter is evaluated at each sample instant. If the predicate returns false for a given pair of from/to States, that sample is treated as non-visible regardless of the geometric visibility criterion.

memberdef.argsstring: (const physics::time::Interval &anInterval, const AccessTarget &anAccessTarget, const Trajectory &aToTrajectory) const
memberdef.name: computeAccessesForTrajectoryTarget

memberdef.argsstring: (const physics::time::Interval &anInterval, const Array< AccessTarget > &someAccessTargets, const Trajectory &aToTrajectory, const bool &coarse=false) const
memberdef.name: computeAccessesForFixedTargets

memberdef.argsstring: (const Array< physics::time::Interval > &someIntervals, const physics::time::Interval &anInterval, const Trajectory &aFromTrajectory, const Trajectory &aToTrajectory) const
memberdef.name: generateAccessesFromIntervals

memberdef.argsstring: (const Array< physics::time::Interval > &accessIntervals, const physics::time::Interval &anAnalysisInterval, const Vector3d &fromPositionCoordinate_ITRF, const Trajectory &aToTrajectory, const AccessTarget &anAccessTarget) const
memberdef.name: computePreciseCrossings

memberdef.argsstring: (const physics::time::Interval &anAccessInterval, const physics::time::Interval &aGlobalInterval, const Trajectory &aFromTrajectory, const Trajectory &aToTrajectory, const Duration &aTolerance)
memberdef.name: GenerateAccess

memberdef.argsstring: (const physics::time::Interval &anAccessInterval, const Trajectory &aFromTrajectory, const Trajectory &aToTrajectory, const Duration &aTolerance)
memberdef.name: FindTimeOfClosestApproach

memberdef.argsstring: (const Instant &anInstant, const Position &aFromPosition, const Position &aToPosition, const Shared< const Celestial > &anEarthSPtr)
memberdef.name: CalculateAer

briefdescription.para: Computes access intervals between a trajectory and one or more access targets.

detaileddescription.para: The Generator evaluates visibility between a "from" trajectory (e.g. a satellite) and one or more AccessTarget objects over a given time interval. It steps through the interval at a configurable cadence, detects crossings of the visibility condition, and then refines each crossing to within a configurable tolerance. Optional access-level and state-level filter functions allow further pruning of the resulting Access objects.
